calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Court Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request of default judgment against Defendant Northgate Parking, Inc., A California corporation.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:45:31 a.m., pausing at 9:46:50 a.m., resuming at 9:58:46 a.m. and concluding at 10:13:17 a.m.(D505)

Stephanie Foster, Esq. representing Plainitiff Alain Etcheverry LLC, a California Limited Liability Company via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Northgate Parking, Inc. A California Corporation not appearing.
Witness Alain Etcheverry sworn to testify for Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer filed Oct-30-2023.
Proof of posting and mailing serving Defendant Northgate Parking, Inc., A California corporation on Oct. 31, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Northgate Parking, Inc., A California corporation on Nov. 17, 2023.
Notice of Motion and Motion to Enter Court Judgment filed Jan. 10, 2024.
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Does 1 to 5 on Nov. 17, 2024.

Counsel to provide a brief summary of the causes of action and an offer of proof as to witness testimony.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Copy of the Lease
Exhibit B: Proof of service
Exhibit D: Rental Value Declaration
Plaintiff calls the witness to testify.
Witness confirms that declarations made, and exhibits submitted are true and correct.

After reviewing the evidence, hearing the testimony, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant the following:
Past Due Rent $18,250.00
Holdover Damages $21,312.00
Attorney's Fees $6,325.50
Costs $8,906.24
Prejudgment Interest $388.80
Total Judgment $48,857.04

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.
